title: feat: add youtube live chat list connector service
goal: Add a bounded, network-disabled YouTube Live Chat list connector service that uses injected fake transport and cursor gateway interfaces only.

risks.risk: List connector loop becomes unbounded or starts sleeping.
risks.mitigation: Service enforces max cycle bounds and tests assert no timer or sleep metadata.

risks.risk: Service accidentally uses real network/OAuth instead of injected fake transport.
risks.mitigation: Constructor only accepts fake_transport and tests assert no global fetch, network, real API, OAuth, or secret use.

risks.risk: Raw page or live chat identifiers leak from service output.
risks.mitigation: Service output is limited to safe counters/statuses and tests reject raw live chat strings.
